	<item>
		<title>SpaceX awarded $6.45B in Space Force contracts ahead of IPO</title>
		<link>https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/29/spacex-awarded-6-45b-in-space-force-contracts-ahead-of-ipo/</link>
		
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[Sean O'Kane]]></dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Fri, 29 May 2026 22:21:38 +0000</pubDate>
				<category><![CDATA[Space]]></category>
		<category><![CDATA[SpaceX]]></category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://techcrunch.com/?p=3127933</guid>

					<description><![CDATA[SpaceX already generated one-fifth of its 2025 revenue from government contracts, the company revealed in its IPO filing.]]></description>
		
		
		
			</item>
		<item>
		<title>Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them </title>
		<link>https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/29/coders-are-refusing-to-work-without-ai-and-that-could-come-back-to-bite-them/</link>
		
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[Julie Bort]]></dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Fri, 29 May 2026 22:14:22 +0000</pubDate>
				<category><![CDATA[AI]]></category>
		<category><![CDATA[TC]]></category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://techcrunch.com/?p=3127904</guid>

					<description><![CDATA[While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them. ]]></description>
		
		
		
			</item>

	<item>
		<title>Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them </title>
		<link>https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/29/coders-are-refusing-to-work-without-ai-and-that-could-come-back-to-bite-them/</link>
		
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[Julie Bort]]></dc:creator>
		<pubDate>Fri, 29 May 2026 22:14:22 +0000</pubDate>
				<category><![CDATA[AI]]></category>
		<category><![CDATA[TC]]></category>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://techcrunch.com/?p=3127904</guid>

					<description><![CDATA[While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them. ]]></description>
		
		
		
			</item>
